data.factory-reset.desc.en: Fully reset your Cardinal Media Server.

data.confirm-factory-reset.en:
For Media Servers installed with Docker Compose, reinstalling with Docker Compose is recommended instead of using this built-in utility.

A factory reset will deindex your media, remove any other data, and return your Media Server to its initial state. Your cloud account will be unlinked from this Media Server.

Your Media Server will become unresponsive while this process runs (it can take a while).
